title: Wagner Moura Wins Golden Globe - Historic First Brazilian Winner
text: Wagner Moura made history at the Golden Globes on Sunday, becoming the first Brazilian actor to win Best Actor in a Drama Film. He won for his role in The Secret Agent, a political thriller set in 1977 Brazil under military dictatorship. In his acceptance speech, Moura reflected on the film's themes: This is to the ones that are sticking with their values in difficult moments. The film, directed by Kleber Mendonça Filho, premiered at the Cannes Film Festival to critical acclaim. The Secret Agent also earned nominations for Best Motion Picture Drama and Best Foreign Language Film, making it the first Brazilian production recognized in the drama film category.
